issue.body:
Filed from the pd-book-tools deep code/security review.

Report: `docs/research/2026-05-22-deep-code-security-review.md`
Finding: #25

Moved from mistakenly filed meta issue: ConcaveTrillion/ocr-container-meta#318

Evidence:

- `pyproject.toml:100`
- `pyproject.toml:102`
- `.gitlab-ci.yml:55`

CuPy modules are omitted from coverage, and GPU CI is allowed to fail.

Impact:

- CUDA code can regress without affecting quality gates.

Remediation:

- Keep CPU coverage separate if needed, but add GPU coverage with its own threshold.

---
This issue was filed from a read-only review. Confirm behavior with a focused failing test before implementation where practical.
issue.title: pd-book-tools: gPU modules are omitted from coverage despite GPU tests
